seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Boulia and Bountiful Islands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Boulia vs Bountiful Islands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boulia and Bountiful Islands.
heading: Boulia vs Bountiful Islands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boulia, Queensland and Bountiful Islands, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boulia has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bountiful Islands (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boulia or Bountiful Islands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boulia has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Bountiful Islands scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boulia scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Bountiful Islands scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boulia or Bountiful Islands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boulia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
